_description: AdmitGuard compliance rules for ALOO University. All numeric thresholds, allowed values, and dependency conditions live here. ValidationEngine contains no hardcoded values.

rules.label: Full Name
rules.errorMessage: Full name must be at least 2 characters and must not contain numbers.

rules.label: Email Address
rules.errorMessage: Enter a valid email address (e.g. candidate@domain.com).

rules.label: Email Address
rules.errorMessage: This email address has already been registered in the system.

rules.label: Phone Number
rules.errorMessage: Phone must be a 10-digit Indian mobile number starting with 6, 7, 8, or 9.

rules.label: Date of Birth
rules.errorMessage: Candidate age must be between 18 and 35. An exception with rationale is required.

rules.label: Aadhaar Number
rules.errorMessage: Aadhaar number must be exactly 12 digits with no spaces or letters.

rules.label: Qualification
rules.errorMessage: Please select a valid qualification from the list.

rules.label: Graduation Year
rules.errorMessage: Graduation year must be between 2015 and 2025. An exception with rationale is required.

rules.label: Academic Score
rules.errorMessage: Enter a valid score. Percentage must be 0–100; CGPA must be 0–10.

rules.label: Academic Score
rules.errorMessage: Academic score is below the recommended threshold (60% / 6.0 CGPA). An exception with rationale is required.

rules.label: Screening Test Score
rules.errorMessage: Screening test score must be a whole number between 0 and 100.

rules.label: Screening Test Score
rules.errorMessage: Screening test score is below the minimum passing threshold of 40. An exception with rationale is required.

rules.label: Interview Status
rules.errorMessage: Interview status must be Cleared, Waitlisted, or Rejected.

rules.label: Interview Status
rules.errorMessage: This application cannot be submitted. The candidate's interview result is Rejected.

rules.label: Interview Status
rules.errorMessage: Offer letter cannot be issued to a candidate whose interview status is Rejected.

rules.label: Offer Letter Sent
rules.errorMessage: Offer letter can only be marked as sent when interview status is Cleared.
